snippet: An important insight from Ida's journey is that health is created through consistent choices over time, where she has chosen supplements from Greatlife for their high quality and clean ingredients.

Ida=E2=80=99s Journey to Holistic Health

=E2=80=8A

From autoimmune disease to holistic health

Ida Carleborn=E2=80=99s health journey began when she was diagnosed with Ha=
shimoto=E2=80=99s, an autoimmune disease that affected her thyroid. Instead=
 of only treating the symptoms, she chose to take a holistic approach to he=
r health.

Rather than accepting the condition as permanent, she decided to deeply und=
erstand her body and work holistically with her health. She realized that t=
rue healing is about the whole picture=E2=80=94where diet, stress, sleep, t=
houghts, and lifestyle all interact. Throughout her journey, Ida has chosen=
 Greatlife supplements, focusing on quality, purity, and carefully selected=
 ingredients.

[Read our interview with Ida =E2=86=92](https://www.greatlife.eu/blog/ida-c=
arleborn-autoimmune-disease-holistic-health)

=E2=80=8A

[Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/blog/ida-carleborn-autoimmune-disease-=
holistic-health)

=E2=80=8A

=E2=80=8A

From symptoms to root cause
Through functional medicine, Ida shifted her focus to the gut, where much o=
f the foundation of autoimmune issues can lie. An imbalance in the gut can =
contribute to inflammation, nutrient deficiencies, and hormonal imbalances.

Supplements for gut and autoimmune balance:
=E2=80=A2 [Digestive Enzymes Plus+](https://www.greatlife.eu/digestive-enzy=
mes-plus) =E2=80=93 digestive enzymes to support digestion
=E2=80=A2 [L-glutamine](https://www.greatlife.eu/glutamine-greatlife) =E2=
=80=93 for the gut lining
=E2=80=A2 [Selenium](https://www.greatlife.eu/selenium-greatlife) =E2=80=93=
 for thyroid function

[Supplements for gut health =E2=86=92](https://www.greatlife.eu/health-goal=
/digestive-health)

Small daily choices, big results

A key insight from Ida=E2=80=99s journey is that health isn=E2=80=99t about=
 a single method, but about consistent choices over time.

She highlights in particular:
Anti-inflammatory, nutrient-dense diet
Regular recovery and sleep
Stress regulation and nervous system balance
Daily routines such as journaling, reflection, and movement

It=E2=80=99s not about perfection=E2=80=94it=E2=80=99s about consistency.

=E2=80=8A

Her foundational supplements:
[Probiotics](https://www.greatlife.eu/flora-plus-probiotic) =E2=80=93 for g=
ut health and immune support
[Vitamin C](https://www.greatlife.eu/vitamin-c-greatlife) =E2=80=93 for cel=
lular health and recovery
[Zinc](https://www.greatlife.eu/zinc-picolinate-greatlife) =E2=80=93 for im=
mune function and hormonal balance
[Vitamin D](https://www.greatlife.eu/vitamin-d3-2000-greatlife) =E2=80=93 f=
or immune support and hormonal stability
[Magnesium](https://www.greatlife.eu/magnesium-greatlife) =E2=80=93 for the=
 nervous system, sleep, and recovery
[Omega-3](https://www.greatlife.eu/wild-alaskan-sockeye-salmon) =E2=80=93 t=
o reduce inflammation and support brain health

Her most important lesson:
Perhaps Ida=E2=80=99s most important realization is that true change is not=
 about trying to =E2=80=9Cfix=E2=80=9D your gut or your stress, but about m=
aking conscious choices in everyday life. By observing, reflecting, and tak=
ing action, we can influence our gut health, nervous system, and long-term =
wellbeing.

Research shows that up to 80% of our health is influenced by lifestyle and =
environment=E2=80=94not just genetics.

This means change is not only possible=E2=80=94it=E2=80=99s in your hands. =
If you need help, contact our customer service at [info@greatlife.eu](mailt=
o:info@greatlife.eu) for free self-care protocols.=C2=A0

[Contact us =E2=86=92](mailto:info@greatlife.eu)

Our advice and tips are not intended for diagnosing or treating diseases. T=
hey do not replace conventional medical care. They are solely provided for =
general information and should not be used as a substitute for professional=
 medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Dietary supplements should not be=
 used as a substitute for a varied diet. It is essential to maintain a dive=
rse and balanced diet along with a healthy lifestyle.
